title: Write an assert_enqueued test for an Oban worker
prompt: Write a test at `test/my_app/reports/report_worker_test.exs` that inserts an Oban job with `MyApp.Reports.ReportWorker.new(%{"id" => 42}) |> Oban.insert()` and then asserts the job was enqueued via `assert_enqueued(worker: MyApp.Reports.ReportWorker, args: %{"id" => 42})`. Include `use Oban.Testing, repo: MyApp.Repo` and `use MyApp.DataCase, async: true`.
